ddls:
CREATE TABLE "whiskies" (
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each whisky */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the whisky */,
  "meta_critic_score" REAL /* Meta critic score of the whisky */,
  "std_dev" REAL /* Standard deviation of the whisky's ratings */,
  "num_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the whisky */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the whisky */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Class of the whisky (e.g., SingleMalt-like) */,
  "super_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Super cluster of the whisky (e.g., None) */,
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Cluster of the whisky (e.g., None) */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Country of origin of the whisky */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of whisky (e.g., Malt) */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the whisky */,
  "abv" REAL /* Alcohol by volume of the whisky */,
  "bottler" TEXT /* Bottler of the whisky */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the whisky image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("whisky_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whiskies_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("cluster_id") REFERENCES clusters ("cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whiskies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whiskies_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whiskies_super_cluster_id FOREIGN KEY ("super_cluster_id") REFERENCES super_clusters ("super_cluster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_whiskies_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "super_clusters" (
  "super_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each super cluster */,
  "super_cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the super cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the super cluster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("super_cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clusters" (
  "cluster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cluster */,
  "cluster_name" TEXT /* Name of the cluster */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cluster */,
  "super_cluster_id" INTEGER /* Super cluster that the cluster belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cluster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the review */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, reviewer, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky being discussed */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the forum */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forum */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the forum was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Forum that the post belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date the post was made */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky whose price is being stored */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the whisky */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  "retailer" TEXT /* Retailer of the whisky */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prices_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_history" (
  "price_history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price history entry */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Price that this history entry belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the whisky at this point in time */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date the price was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_history_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky being recommended from */,
  "recommended_whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_recommended_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tastes" (
  "taste_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taste */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky whose taste is being described */,
  "taste" TEXT /* Description of the taste */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taste_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tastes_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flavor_profiles" (
  "flavor_profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flavor profile */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky whose flavor profile is being described */,
  "flavor_profile" TEXT /* Description of the flavor profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flavor_profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flavor_profiles_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "whisky_id" INTEGER /* Whisky that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_whisky_id FOREIGN KEY ("whisky_id") REFERENCES whiskies ("whisky_id")
)
column_names: Meta critic score of the whisky
Standard deviation of the whisky's ratings
Number of reviews for the whisky
Super cluster of the whisky (e.g., None)
Country of origin of the whisky
Alcohol by volume of the whisky

Super cluster that the cluster belongs to
Continent where the country is located
Role of the user (e.g., enthusiast, reviewer, admin)
Forum that the post belongs to
Whisky whose price is being stored
Unique identifier for each price history entry
Price that this history entry belongs to

Whisky whose taste is being described
Unique identifier for each flavor profile
Whisky whose flavor profile is being described
